news.headline: China Daily marks 25 years of Macao's return with special data page showcasing achievements.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Beijing, a news report by China Daily highlighted the 25th anniversary of Macao's return to China. To mark this occasion, China Daily, an English-language newspaper, released a special data page on Friday. The page, designed artistically, includes graphics that display various information related to the anniversary celebration. This publication commemorates the significant milestone in Macao's history within the motherland.

news.headline: Salute appoints Clarence Philipneri as CFO, effective Jan 6, 2025, to scale operations.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Salute, the top global data center lifecycle services company, announced the appointment of Clarence Philipneri as its new Chief Financial Officer (CFO), starting January 6, 2025. This decision underscores Salute's dedication to expanding its operations and solidifying its financial leadership.

news.headline: Germany’s Chancellor Scholz asked about Trump Demand: Germany already imports 90% of its LNG gas from the US.
Dow Jones futures drop after Trump-backed bill fails; Novo Nordisk plunges. Market bounce on Thursday falters.
news.summary: Stock futures experienced a decline after the House rejected a bill supported by former President Trump in an attempt to prevent a government shutdown. This occurred on Thursday, leading to a brief market rebound that ultimately dissipated. Consequently, Dow Jones futures dropped following this event. Notably, Novo Nordisk shares took a significant hit amidst these developments.

news.headline: Bitcoin ETFs experience largest outflows ever, totaling $672M as investors cash in amid Fed policy uncertainty. Analysts foresee profit-taking.
news.summary: An analyst forecasts that investors are expected to begin cashing in on their gains as a result of the ambiguity arising from the Federal Reserve’s stance. The uncertainty in the market is leading to this foreseeable trend, with investors likely to start selling off their holdings to secure profits. The Federal Reserve's policy decisions have prompted this cautious approach, potentially prompting a shift in the market.

news.headline: SEALSQ integrates post-quantum cryptographic chips on WISeSat satellites to secure communications. Milestone announcement on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: In Geneva, Switzerland on December 20, 2024, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) revealed the incorporation of its new post-quantum cryptographic chips into WISeSat satellites. This move exemplifies SEALSQ’s dedication to safeguarding satellite communications amid growing concerns related to quantum computing. The company specializes in developing and marketing Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology hardware and software products. This significant advancement showcases SEALSQ's ongoing efforts to enhance security measures with the integration of cutting-edge technology on WISeSat satellites. To view a demonstration of the latest development, click here.

news.headline: CACI makes Forbes 2025 America’s Most Trusted Companies list. CACI focuses on character, integrity, and ethics. CEO expresses gratitude.
news.summary: A company based in Reston, Virginia, CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI), has recently been included in the prestigious Forbes 2025 list of America’s Most Trusted Companies. John Mengucci, the President and CEO of CACI, emphasized the company’s long-standing dedication to character, integrity, and ethics, which have earned them the public's trust for over six decades. This recognition highlights CACI’s commitment to maintaining a positive reputation and credibility in the industry.

news.headline: Horizon Copper Corp reports positive arbitration outcome with Entrée Resources Ltd on Joint Venture Agreement.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on Dec. 20, 2024, Horizon Copper Corp. (TSXV: HCU) (OTCQX: HNCUF) announced positive developments from Entrée Resources Ltd. ("Entrée") about ongoing arbitration linked to their Joint Venture Agreement.

news.headline: Tune in to The Pulse hosted by Francine Lacqua on 12/20/2024 for the latest news and analysis.
Financial analyst expects increase in startup mergers and acquisitions under Trump, with $1 million Bitcoin forecasted.
news.summary: Cathie Wood anticipates a significant rise in mergers and acquisitions (M&A) during Trump's administration due to deregulation and lower FTC barriers. Wood predicts a substantial increase in M&A deals in the market.

news.headline: Neinor Homes plans to allocate €125mn to shareholders in Q1 2025, with distribution of €1.66/share at 11% yield.
Switzerland and the EU announce agreement to overhaul trade relations.
American Battery Factory partners with Kan Battery to enhance cell production ahead of US launch; focusing on developing domestic lithium battery supply chain.
news.summary: ABF's primary objective is to establish a self-sufficient lithium (LFP) battery cell supply chain in the United States. Based in American Fork, Utah, the American Battery Factory Inc. (ABF) is dedicated to bringing in expertise to develop this local supply chain. This initiative, undertaken on December 20, 2024, marks a significant step towards reducing reliance on foreign sources for lithium batteries and promoting domestic production capabilities.

news.headline: Safe Pro Group expects record-breaking 2024 revenue, surging over 130% to over $2 million, with 200% Q4 revenue increase.
news.summary: The Aventura-based Safe Pro Group Inc. (Nasdaq: SPAI), a prominent provider of artificial intelligence (AI) solutions focusing on drone image processing, has projected a substantial increase in revenue for the fiscal year 2024. The anticipated annual revenue is expected to reach more than 130% above the figures reported for fiscal year 2023. This notable growth is primarily attributed to a remarkable surge of over 200% in fourth-quarter revenue compared to the same period last year, indicating robust sales performance within the Company's mission.

news.headline: Guardant Health and MiBA partner to improve cancer care using biomarker testing and data analytics, aiming to advance patient care. (Characters: 122)
news.summary: In a joint statement today, Guardant Health, Inc. (Nasdaq: GH) and Meaningful Insights Biotech Analytics (MiBA) revealed their partnership focusing on enhancing precision medicine in patient care within the MiBA Network. Guardant Health, a key player in precision oncology, and MiBA, a healthcare technology firm, aim to elevate biomarker testing and data analytics. This collaboration addresses the changing realm of precision medicine. The partnership seeks to leverage MiBA's capabilities and Guardant Health's expertise to advance patient care through precision medicine.

news.headline: IO Biotech receives €57.5M loan from European Investment Bank, with committed tranches of €37.5M and uncommitted €20M.
news.summary: IO Biotech, a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq (Ticker: IOBT), has recently secured a loan facility from the European Investment Bank (EIB) in Denmark and New York. The facility amounts to €57.5 million in total, with three committed tranches of up to €37.5 million subject to certain conditions, and an uncommitted accordion tranche of €20 million. The company anticipates that the initial two tranches will be ready for disbursement by the first quarter of 2025.

news.headline: UF/IFAS, Florida Strawberry Industry, and Ohalo collaborate to fight fungal disease with a new agreement in Dec. 2024.
news.summary: In Aptos, California on December 20, 2024, Ohalo Genetics, Inc. announced a significant partnership. The company has signed a pioneering Development & Commercialization Agreement with the University of Florida's Institute of Food and Agricultural Sciences, as well as Florida Foundation Seed Producers, Inc., and the Florida Strawberry Growers Association. This collaboration is expected to revolutionize research and commercialization efforts in the agriculture sector. Stay tuned for advancements resulting from this strategic partnership.

news.headline: GreenFirst extends asset-based lending facility with BMO to $60M, with possibility of $65M more till 2028.
news.summary: Toronto-based company GreenFirst Forest Products Inc. (TSX: GFP) has recently revealed the continuation of its asset-based lending arrangement with the Bank of Montreal. Under this extended agreement, GreenFirst has secured a senior facility worth $60 million, with the option to increase it by an extra $65 million. This move aims to bolster the company's financial position and flexibility for future endeavors until September 2028. The extension offers GreenFirst the capacity to pursue growth opportunities and strategic plans effectively.

news.headline: NIAAA warns of holiday drinking risks as some may exceed limits, leading to adverse consequences.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024 in Bethesda, Maryland, it was highlighted that the holiday season often leads to increased alcohol consumption, with many individuals engaging in excessive drinking. This behavior is more prevalent during this time of year compared to other periods. As a result, some individuals may face negative outcomes as a consequence of their actions.

news.headline: IAS partners with Alpine Project and 51toCarbonZero to advance sustainability efforts in carbon measurement and reduction. #innovation
news.summary: In efforts to enhance carbon measurement, transparency, and reduction, Integral Ad Science (Nasdaq: IAS) has unveiled collaborations with two prominent sustainability organizations. The partnerships aim to drive innovation in these areas and emphasize the importance of environmental impact. This move by Integral Ad Science underscores its commitment to contributing to a more sustainable future. The announcement, made on December 20, 2024 in New York, signifies a significant step towards advancing eco-conscious practices within the global media industry.

news.headline: Chairman & CEO of HNO International releases 'Hydrogen Economy Vision' interview from NASDAQ Marketsite.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Houston, HNO International, Inc. (OTC: HNOI), a prominent player in hydrogen-driven clean energy solutions, disclosed the launch of an interview with Donald Owens, the Chairman and CEO of HNO International, discussing the 'Hydrogen Economy' vision. This interview took place at the NASDAQ Marketsite.

news.headline: Playtika partners with IGT, bringing world-class slots to social casino games with Slotomania, Caesars Slots, and House of Fun.
news.summary: Playtika, a renowned mobile gaming and interactive entertainment leader, recently revealed a new partnership with IGT. This collaboration will see IGT slot titles integrated into Playtika's popular social casino games, including Slotomania, Caesars Slots, and House of Fun. The announcement was made on December 20, 2024, in Herzliya, Israel. Playtika, listed on NASDAQ with the ticker symbol PLTK, connects with IGT, listed on NYSE with the ticker symbol IGT, to enhance their gaming offerings. This strategic move aims to bring a wider range of gaming experiences to Playtika's platform, benefiting from the expertise and game variety that IGT brings to the table. This collaboration signifies a significant development within the gaming industry and highlights the continual evolution and innovation in the mobile gaming sector.

news.headline: CRENESSITY for Classic Congenital Adrenal Hyperplasia now available in US. 24/7 support by CAH-trained pharmacists.
news.summary: The new medication CRENESSITY, designed to treat Classic Congenital Adrenal Hyperplasia (CAH), is officially on the market in the United States. Patients can receive round-the-clock assistance from CAH-trained pharmacists for their prescriptions, exclusively through PANTHERx Rare, a specialty pharmacy part of the Neurocrine Access program.

news.headline: AAR sells Landing Gear Overhaul business to GA Telesis to focus on core operations. NYSE: AIR, Dec 20, 2024.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Wood Dale, Illinois, AAR CORP. revealed that it had finalized a deal to sell its Landing Gear Overhaul business to GA Telesis. AAR CORP. (NYSE: AIR), a major aviation services provider for commercial and government operations, as well as MROs and OEMs, made the announcement. The specifics of the agreement were not disclosed, but the move is expected to significantly impact AAR CORP.'s operations and financial standing going forward.

news.headline: GA Telesis LLC to acquire AAR CORP's Landing Gear Overhaul business and Wheels & Brakes business unit.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on December 20, 2024, GA Telesis, LLC, a leading provider of aviation services worldwide, revealed its acquisition of AAR CORP.'s Landing Gear Overhaul business and Wheels & Brakes business unit through a definitive agreement. This acquisition is poised to significantly impact the aviation industry upon finalization.

news.headline: Cross Timbers Royalty Trust (NYSE: CRT) declares December cash distribution of $0.062265 per unit, payable on January 15, 2025.
news.summary: Today in Dallas, on December 20, 2024, the Cross Timbers Royalty Trust, managed by Argent Trust Company, announced a cash distribution of $0.062265 for each unit of beneficial interest (NYSE: CRT). This distribution is set to be paid out on January 15, 2025, to all unitholders.

news.headline: United Way, Prezzee, and GoFundMe.org collaborate to support North Carolina after Hurricane Helene, offering $200 grants to 300 families in need.
news.summary: A collaboration has been established in Raleigh, North Carolina to offer $200 grants to a minimum of 300 families in need following Hurricane Helene. United Way of North Carolina, Prezzee, and GoFundMe.org have joined forces to initiate a hurricane relief fund to provide urgent assistance. The partnership aims to support those affected by the natural disaster by distributing financial aid to the identified families.

news.headline: CT United FC appoints Annunziato Zavettieri as Academy Director, Head Coach U16 team; brings European experience. (Numbers: 1 coach)
news.summary: In Bridgeport, Connecticut on December 20th, 2024, Connecticut United Football Club (CT United FC) revealed the selection of Italian coach Annunziato "Nunzio" Zavettieri as the Academy Director and Head Coach for the U16 team. Zavettieri, with a robust background at prominent European clubs, brings a wealth of knowledge and expertise to this role.

news.headline: Frontier Asset Management partners with SEI to launch 6 active ETFs on Advisors' Inner Circle Fund Trust.
news.summary: SEI disclosed that Frontier Asset Management has opted for the Advisors' Inner Circle Fund® (AIC) series trust as its operational platform to introduce six new strategies. This move, announced in OAKS, Pa., occurred on December 20, 2024. SEI® (NASDAQ: SEIC) further revealed the decision, showcasing the growth opportunity AIC offers asset managers.

news.headline: Verismo Therapeutics merges with HLB Innovation to speed up clinical development. HLB is now the sole owner of Verismo.
news.summary: Verismo Therapeutics, a company in Philadelphia, recently finalized a merger making it a subsidiary of HLB Innovation (KOSDAQ: 024850). Verismo Therapeutics is known for its innovative KIR-CAR platform technology for CAR T therapy. The merger was completed on December 20, 2024.

news.headline: Neuberger Berman introduces two new actively managed ETFs: Total Return Bond ETF (NBTR) and Growth ETF (NBGX).
news.summary: Neuberger Berman, a private investment manager based in New York, has recently unveiled two new actively managed ETFs. The Neuberger Berman Total Return Bond ETF (NYSE: NBTR) and Neuberger Berman Growth ETF (NYSE: NBGX) are now available for investors looking to diversify their portfolios. The launch adds to the firm's existing range of investment options and provides opportunities for those seeking growth or stable returns. This move reflects Neuberger Berman's commitment to innovation and meeting the evolving needs of investors in the market.

news.headline: Permian Basin Royalty Trust announces $0.021939 cash distribution per unit payable on January 15, 2025.
news.summary: Dallas, December 20, 2024 - Acting as Trustee of the Permian Basin Royalty Trust (NYSE: PBT), Argent Trust Company announced a cash distribution of $0.021939 per unit to holders of beneficial interest. This payment is scheduled to be made on January 15, 2025.

news.headline: Kellanova offers holiday specials with festive flavors and creative packaging in Chicago, spreading cheer.
news.summary: Spread joy during every holiday occasion with Kellanova's delightful seasonal snacks in Chicago. As of December 20, 2024, the company is offering a variety of cheerful treats designed to enhance the holiday experience. From festive flavors to uniquely crafted packaging, each bite promises to evoke the spirit of the season, ensuring a joyous celebration.

news.headline: Hugoton Royalty Trust (OTCQB: HGTXU) will not distribute cash in December 2024 due to excess costs.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024 in Dallas, Argent Trust Company, acting as Trustee of the Hugoton Royalty Trust, stated that there will be no cash distribution for December 2024 to holders of its beneficial interest units. This decision was influenced by the excessive cost positions. The Trust is listed as OTCQB: HGTXU.

news.headline: 40 Strategy, a strategic planning consultancy, wins two awards at the 2024 Business Worldwide Global Corporate Excellence Awards.
news.summary: In London on December 20, 2024, 40 Strategy, a prominent strategic planning consultancy under the leadership of CEO Carl J Cox, gained recognition globally by securing two esteemed awards at the 2024 Business Worldwide Global Corporate Excellence Awards. The consultancy was honored for its...

news.headline: Friends of CA State Fair offering $40,000+ scholarships for post-secondary education to CA residents. Apply now for 2025-26.
news.summary: A scholarship program in Sacramento, California has granted over $40,000 in scholarships to residents of the state who are working towards post-secondary education. The Friends of the California State Fair Scholarship Program for 2025-26 is currently accepting applications from graduating high school students.

news.headline: Aethlon Medical updates on Hemopurifier's ability to capture H5N1 bird flu virus. Nasdaq: AEMD.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in San Diego, Aethlon Medical, Inc. (Nasdaq: AEMD), a company specializing in medical therapeutics for cancer and infectious diseases, announced details about its investigational medical device targeting H5N1 avian flu.

news.headline: reAlpha launches enterprise version for corporate relocations, targeting $25B market with cost savings for employers and employees.
news.summary: In Dublin, Ohio, on December 20, 2024, reAlpha Tech Corp. unveiled the enterprise edition of its commission-free AI homebuying platform. The company, listed on Nasdaq as AIRE, focuses on developing and introducing AI technologies in the real estate sector. The new offering, reAlpha Enterprise, is designed to meet the needs of corporate relocation programs. This move is aimed at tapping into the $25 billion market related to employee relocation, providing financial benefits for employers and employees alike.

news.headline: EasyVista acquires majority shareholding in OTRS Group, aiming to be a global IT leader. €70M sales target for 2021.
news.summary: A recent acquisition by EasyVista has seen them attaining a majority stake in ITSM provider OTRS Group, based in Germany and listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange. Backed by Eurazeo, EasyVista is approaching €70 million in sales for the year, with approximately half stemming from international markets. The completion of the deal has secured over 90% of OTRS shares under EasyVista's ownership.

news.headline: Quantum-Si's new paper showcases ProteoVue software for detecting Single Amino Acid Variants using Next-Generation Protein Sequencing™, submitted to BioRxiv.
news.summary: Branford, Connecticut - Quantum-Si Incorporated, trading as QSI on Nasdaq, has introduced a new paper to BioRxiv showcasing their bioinformatics tool ProteoVue. This tool has shown promise in identifying and measuring Single Amino Acid Variants (SAAVs). The paper, named "Detecting Amino Acid Variants Using Next-Generation Protein Sequencing (NGPS)," emphasizes the game-changing capabilities of Quantum-Si's technology in this field.

news.headline: GiveCard and City of El Monte extend Guaranteed Income pilot to support 125 low-income participants, focusing on single parents and mothers.
news.summary: In El Monte, California, GiveCard, a payments platform transforming social impact initiatives, has revealed a continuation of its collaboration with the City of El Monte to sustain its thriving Guaranteed Income pilot project. The extended partnership is dedicated to offering financial assistance to the initial 125 economically disadvantaged individuals who participated in the program's inaugural year, with a specific emphasis on aiding single mothers and their infants as they advance through the initiative.

news.headline: SonicEdge introduces SonicTwin, world's smallest speaker-microphone for TWS devices at 8x4x1 mm, launched at CES 2025.
news.summary: In Binyamina-Giv’at Ada, Israel, SonicEdge LTD has unveiled SonicTwin at CES 2025, boasting as the globe's tiniest integrated speaker-microphone for TWS earbuds and headphones. Measuring a mere 8 x 4 x 1 mm, SonicTwin merges advanced sound production and sensing functions, showcasing a groundbreaking advancement in compact audio design. Operated by SonicEdge’s exclusive modulated ultrasound technology, SonicTwin offers a revolutionary audio experience.

news.headline: Ryde Group Ltd launches Cashback Christmas Challenge for Ryde+ members in Singapore to enhance savings this festive season.
news.summary: Singapore-based tech company Ryde Group Ltd (NYSE American: RYDE) has initiated the Supersized Cashback Christmas Challenge for Ryde+ subscription members. This campaign, launched by the mobility and quick commerce platform, aims to provide substantial savings and perks during the festive period. By focusing on enhancing rider loyalty, Ryde highlights the versatility of its subscription-driven revenue strategy. This move demonstrates the company's commitment to rewarding its members and showcasing the value proposition of its platform.

news.headline: Perfect Corp. highlights B2B AI innovations at CES 2025, global leader in AR technology, showcased at CES Creator Space.
news.summary: Perfect Corp., a leading company in augmented reality and artificial intelligence technology for beauty and fashion, will be participating at CES 2025 in Las Vegas from January 7 to 9, 2025. The company, listed on the NYSE as PERF, will be presenting its innovative Beautiful AI advancements at the CES Creator Space. This event, sponsored by Sony, will focus on demonstrating how AI and AR are revolutionizing the beauty, fashion, and creator industries.

news.headline: MGP Ingredients appoints Brandon Gall as Interim President and CEO, effective Jan 1, 2025, succeeding David Bratcher. Bratcher to resign on Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: ATCHISON, Kan.--MGP Ingredients, Inc. revealed that Brandon Gall, the current CFO, has been named as the Interim President and CEO starting January 1, 2025, succeeding David Bratcher. Bratcher will step down from the Board of Directors by December 31, 2024, but will provide advisory support for a seamless transition before retiring. MGP Ingredients, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol MGPI.

news.headline: RRD to acquire Williams Lea, expanding business support services globally; deal expected to close in Q1 2025.
news.summary: In Chicago, RRD, a prominent global company offering marketing, packaging, print, and supply chain solutions, disclosed its definitive agreement with Advent to purchase Williams Lea. Williams Lea is renowned for providing tech-enabled business support services to financial, legal, and professional services firms globally. The acquisition, anticipated to finalize in Q1 2025 subject to regulatory approval and standard closing conditions, will integrate Williams Lea into RRD's operations.

news.headline: Impending fiscal battles foreseen as debt limit clash looms, raising concerns over financial management.
Aqua Metals achieves breakthroughs in lithium battery recycling, secures $1.5M bridge loan for operations.
news.summary: In Reno, Nevada on December 20, 2024, Aqua Metals, Inc. disclosed accomplishments at its pilot facility for lithium battery recycling. The company, trading as AQMS on NASDAQ, highlighted the efficacy and expandability of its unique Li AquaRefining™ process. Alongside this, Aqua Metals confirmed the finalization of a $1.5 million bridge loan to maintain operations. Simultaneously, the company is engaged in continued examination and strategic planning for securing long-range financing.

news.headline: Aridis Pharmaceuticals, Inc. provides corporate update on recent developments on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: In Los Gatos, California, on December 20, 2024, Aridis Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (OTC: ARDS), a biopharmaceutical company, provided a corporate update regarding recent developments.

news.headline: Sernova reschedules shareholders meeting to Jan 10, 2025 due to postal strike, originally set for Jan 7, 2025.
news.summary: Sernova Corp., a leading regenerative medicine company focusing on developing the Cell Pouch bio-hybrid organ as a functional cure for type 1 diabetes, will conduct its annual general and special meeting of shareholders on Friday, January 10, 2025, at 1:00 pm ET. Initially planned for January 7, 2025, this rescheduled meeting is due to the recent postal strike in Canada impacting the mailing of meeting materials to meet regulatory standards. Sernova Corp. trades on TSX under SVA, OTCQB under SEOVF, and FSE/XETRA under PSH.
